mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_agents WHERE AGENT_USE = 'Y') AS totalAgents,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_agents WHERE AGENT_USE = 'Y' AND agent_connected = 1) AS activeAgents,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_agents WHERE AGENT_USE = 'Y' AND (agent_connected = 0 OR agent_connected IS NULL)) AS inactiveAgents,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_scan_history) AS totalScans,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_scan_history WHERE LOWER(status) = 'running') AS runningScans,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_scan_history WHERE LOWER(status) = 'scheduled') AS scheduledScans,
'NORMAL' AS systemStatus, NOW() AS lastUpdateTime

SELECT t.target_id AS targetNo, t.name AS targetName, a.agent_connected_ip AS targetIp, t.group_id AS groupId, tg.name AS groupName, COUNT(f.hash_id) AS detectionCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dp.processing_flag IS NOT NULL AND dp.processing_flag != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dp.approval_status = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS truePositiveCount, MAX(f.regdate) AS lastDetectionDate FROM pi_targets t LEFT JOIN pi_find f ON t.target_id = f.target_id AND t.ap_no = f.ap_no LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.target_id = dp.target_id AND f.ap_no = dp.ap_no AND f.hash_id = dp.hash_id LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.TARGET_ID = a.agent_name AND t.ap_no = a.ap_no LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON t.group_idx = tg.idx WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND t.group_id = #{groupId}
AND (f.regdate IS NULL OR f.regdate >= #{startDate})
AND (f.regdate IS NULL OR f.regdate <= #{endDate})
GROUP BY t.target_id, t.ap_no, t.name, a.agent_connected_ip, t.group_id, tg.name ORDER BY detectionCount DESC
